title: lepidium salsum
intro: Lepidium salsum, also known as salt and pepper cress or wild pepper cress, is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Lepidium salsum include its ability to aid in digestion, lower blood pressure, and reduce symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Lepidium salsum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
